description: Style NoteWe like an occasional dash of colour. We like basics that are simple yet stylish. We like excellent fits. We like clothes that are comfortable. Because of all this, we absolutely love fila! This pair of shorts from FILA has a cool sporty look and is just what you need when you're spending time at the gym or playing outdoor games. Product DetailsNavy blue shorts, has a soft elasticated waistband with a drawstring tie that is tie-able on the inside, two insert pockets on either side in front, branding above the hemline on the side and on the side and mesh liningMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldDo not tumble, bleach or iron on print / decorationsUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
